basic_details.job_title: ICMR NITHR Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: ICMR-National Institute for Tribal Health Research (NITHR), Jabalpur
basic_details.short_information: ICMR-NITHR is recruiting 2 Consultant (Scientific Non-Medical) posts on contractual basis.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc./MD or equivalent with minimum 8 years post-qualification experience
qualification.details: Essential Qualifications: Professionals having proven competency and success in their area of specialization, with at least 8 years of post-qualification experience and minimum M.Sc./MD or equivalent qualifications in relevant subject. | Desirable Qualification and Experience: | Experience in Research project execution & management Distinguished publication record with high citations and strong H-index Experience in Biomedical Sciences / Tribal Health research Experience with molecular diagnostic platforms Experience in organising training and capacity building programmes | Age Limit: 40 to 60 years (as on last date of application)

how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates may submit their duly filled application in the prescribed format along with self-attested photocopies of relevant documents.
Download the prescribed application format from the official notification.
Fill the application form carefully with all required details.
Attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, age proof, publication list, and a recent passport-size photograph.
Send the complete application through Speed Post only to: Establishment-II (Project Cell), Room No. 110, ICMR-NITHR Campus, Nagpur Road, Dhanvantri Nagar, Garha, Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh – 482003.
The application must reach on or before 17th July 2026.
No other mode of application (email/hand delivery etc.) will be entertained.
Incomplete applications or applications received after the last date will not be considered.
Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview/personal discussion.
No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.
important_instructions: This is a purely temporary contractual engagement with no claim for regular appointment/absorption. The contract can be terminated at any time with one month’s notice. Consultants cannot take up any other full-time or part-time assignment during the engagement. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For updates, regularly visit the official ICMR-NITHR and ICMR websites.

content_sections.text: ICMR-NITHR is recruiting 2 Consultant (Scientific Non-Medical) posts on contractual basis.

content_sections.heading: ICMR-NITHR Consultant Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential Qualifications: Professionals having proven competency and success in their area of specialization, with at least 8 years of post-qualification experience and minimum M.Sc./MD or equivalent qualifications in relevant subject. Desirable Qualification and Experience: Experience in Research project execution & management Distinguished publication record with high citations and strong H-index Experience in Biomedical Sciences / Tribal Health research Experience with molecular diagnostic platforms Experience in organising training and capacity building programmes Age Limit: 40 to 60 years (as on last date of application)

content_sections.heading: ICMR-NITHR Consultant Recruitment 2026 Job Description
content_sections.text: Consultants will provide high-quality services in scientific activities related to Tribal Health Research, project management, and other assigned tasks.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply ICMR-NITHR Consultant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested and eligible candidates may submit their duly filled application in the prescribed format along with self-attested photocopies of relevant documents. Step-by-Step Application Process: Download the prescribed application format from the official notification. Fill the application form carefully with all required details. Attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, age proof, publication list, and a recent passport-size photograph. Send the complete application through Speed Post only to: Establishment-II (Project Cell), Room No. 110, ICMR-NITHR Campus, Nagpur Road, Dhanvantri Nagar, Garha, Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh – 482003. The application must reach on or before 17th July 2026. Important Points: No other mode of application (email/hand delivery etc.) will be entertained. Incomplete applications or applications received after the last date will not be considered. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview/personal discussion. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for ICMR-NITHR Consultant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: This is a purely temporary contractual engagement with no claim for regular appointment/absorption. The contract can be terminated at any time with one month’s notice. Consultants cannot take up any other full-time or part-time assignment during the engagement. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. For updates, regularly visit the official ICMR-NITHR and ICMR websites. Apply Offline (Speed Post) by 17-07-2026

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICMR-NITHR Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for receipt of application is 17 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in ICMR NITHR Advt 02/2026-27?
faq.answer: There are 02 vacancies for Consultant (Scientific Non-Medical) positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for ICMR NITHR Consultant (Scientific Non-Medical)?
faq.answer: Consolidated remuneration is Rs. 80,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for ICMR NITHR Consultant post?
faq.answer: M.Sc./MD or equivalent with minimum 8 years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for ICMR NITHR Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: 40 to 60 years as on the last date of application submission.

faq.question: Q6. What is the nature of engagement for ICMR NITHR Consultants?
faq.answer: Purely temporary and contractual for one year.

faq.question: Q7. How to apply for ICMR NITHR Consultant 2026?
faq.answer: Applications must be sent through Speed Post in the prescribed format to the given address by 17-07-2026.

faq.question: Q8. Is prior experience in Tribal Health Research required for ICMR NITHR Consultant?
faq.answer: Experience in Tribal Health research is desirable but not mandatory.

faq.question: Q9. Will retired government employees get special remuneration in ICMR NITHR?
faq.answer: Yes, remuneration for retired Govt. servants will be fixed as per Ministry of Finance guidelines.

faq.question: Q10. Is this ICMR NITHR Consultant position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is a short-term contractual engagement with no claim for regularization.
